channel.title: Firebase :: K-State CS Textbook Extras
channel.description: At this point, we have the basic concept of a mobile application that helps a user track to do tasks. However, currently our data is only stored in the local application state, which is only accessible on a single device. In addition, at any time a user could choose to clear the application’s cache, and all data would be lost. So, let’s explore adding a cloud service to our application that will store our user’s data for us. In addition, we’ll use this service to manage our user accounts and authentication.
